error[E0277]: `Cell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/deepseek-v3.2/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_002/target.rs:10:12
   |
10 | static CS: &S = &S {
   |            ^^ `Cell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
   |
   = help: within `&'static S`, the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `Cell<i32>`
   = note: if you want to do aliasing and mutation between multiple threads, use `std::sync::RwLock` or `std::sync::atomic::AtomicI32` instead
note: required because it appears within the type `S`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/deepseek-v3.2/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_002/target.rs:1:8
   |
 1 | struct S {
   |        ^
   = note: required because it appears within the type `&'static S`
   = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`

error[E0492]: interior mutable shared borrows of temporaries that have their lifetime extended until the end of the program are not allowed
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/deepseek-v3.2/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_002/target.rs:10:17
   |
10 |   static CS: &S = &S {
   |  _________________^
11 | |     i: std::cell::Cell::new(3),
12 | |     ci: 4,
13 | | };
   | |_^ this borrow of an interior mutable value refers to such a temporary
   |
   = note: Temporaries in constants and statics can have their lifetime extended until the end of the program
   = note: To avoid accidentally creating global mutable state, such temporaries must be immutable
   = help: If you really want global mutable state, try replacing the temporary by an interior mutable `static` or a `static mut`
